REMITTITUR FILED SUPERIOR COURT DETERMINES THAT APPELLANT'S FAIL TO DEMONSTRA TE PREJUDICIAL ERROR. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT THE ORDER ENTERED IN THE MUNICIPAL COURT IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1034 AND CRC, RULES 135 (A,B & C) COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED TO THE PREVAILING PARTY.
PETITION FOR REHEARING ON APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT ORDERED DENIED ON MAY 7, 1999.

REMITTITUR - IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT MADE AND ENTERED IN THE MUNICIPAL COURT OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1034 AND CRC, RULE 135 (A,B AND C), COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED TO THE PREVAILING PARTY.
